description:
This is the second report since the first one did not have a lot of evidence, I believe this person is engaging in unfair gameplay by using recoil scripts, which provides them with an unfair advantage over other players. The purpose of this report is to bring this matter to your attention and request appropriate action to maintain the integrity of the game. Hope you can find a resolution as soon as possible, this is sadly the only clip but I hope you can watch how he plays in the game replay.

Please think about this carefully, recoil scripts are not always 0 recoil. They have randomizations to make it humanized. Please review these clips and let me know if you need anymore, judging by the attachments he's playing with and the low recoil he's having it has to be a script.
